text:
Shipped a few updates this week to make the infrastructure a little smarter. The JS SDK now handles Speech-to-Text and media uploads natively. We also fixed up the media service—downloads are cleaner, and files hash properly now. Oh, and step-3.5-flash is officially routed and ready in the text backend. Build something weird with it. Code's on GitHub as always. 🐝✨

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #webdev #javascript #aiart #npm
